form.title: Request
form.name: Name
form.success: Request is ready to be sent.

slide1.title: Hotels in Val Gardena: Personal Dolomites Selection
slide1.text: Personal selection of premium hotels and chalets from an expert. With Fursa Dolomiti you get more than with regular booking.

slide2.title: Mountain vacation without hassle
slide2.text: We'll match the area, hotel, transfer and season to your trip so all details come together before departure.

slide3.title: Dolomites with a local expert
slide3.text: We'll advise where to stay, ski, walk and dine, and solve important questions personally and quickly.

hero.quote: I've lived with my family in the Dolomites - in Val Gardena - since 2000. I help guests from all over the world find the best place to vacation in one of the world's best ski resorts.

alpenroyal.name: Alpenroyal 5★
alpenroyal.description: Secluded hotel with high level of service and calm atmosphere in Selva

edenselva.name: Edenselva 4★
edenselva.description: Family hotel with cozy atmosphere and excellent location

howItWorks.title: How to book and receive your bonus
howItWorks.note: Booking through FursaDolomiti is more than a convenient way to find the right hotel for your stay. It gives you access to bonuses that are not available with a direct booking.
howItWorks.help: If you need help choosing a hotel or chalet, message me and I will help you find the right option.
howItWorks.disclaimer: The size and format of the bonus depend on the hotel and booking period.

steps.title: Choose a hotel
steps.text: Only four- and five-star hotels that I have worked with personally for many years.

steps.title: Go to the hotel website
steps.text: Click “Book with bonus” and the form for entering your details will open.

steps.title: Enter your name, surname and email
steps.text: This lets me identify you as a FursaDolomiti guest and prepare your personal bonus.

steps.title: Use the FursaDolomiti promo code
steps.text: When searching or booking a room, enter the promo code in the dedicated field or add it to the booking comments.

steps.title: Book independently
steps.text: Use the usual process directly on the hotel’s official website. No intermediaries.

steps.title: Receive your bonus at check-in
steps.text: I will personally prepare a bonus for your stay, and it will be waiting for you when you arrive.

whyMe.title: Why guests book through me
whyMe.panelTitle: You book directly, while I help you get more
whyMe.lead: I have lived in Val Gardena since 2000 and personally know the hotels, areas, seasons and small details that shape a Dolomites stay.

reasons.title: Direct hotel contacts
reasons.text: I work directly with owners and managers, so I can clarify details and guest opportunities faster.

reasons.title: A match for your trip
reasons.text: I help choose the area, service level, stay format and dates without random compromises.

reasons.title: Bonuses at check-in
reasons.text: I prepare a personal bonus for FursaDolomiti guests when it is available at the selected hotel.

reasons.title: Inside knowledge of the resort
reasons.text: I advise where it is best to stay for skiing, walks, restaurants and a calm family holiday.

reasons.title: Help before the trip
reasons.text: I help with transfer, season, location and the details that matter before you arrive.

reasons.title: A person on site
reasons.text: If you need a clarification or advice during your stay, you can contact someone who lives nearby.

personalSelection.title: Didn’t find the right option?
personalSelection.note: In addition to the hotels shown on the website, I work with private chalets and other accommodation options in the Dolomites.
personalSelection.help: Personal selection is available by individual request.

instructor.title: Russian-speaking instructors in the Dolomites
instructor.lead: In high season, good instructors get booked quickly.
instructor.text1: I work with trusted schools and instructors I know personally.
instructor.text2: I arrange direct booking with your skiing level and age in mind.

features.text: For adults and children, any level

reviews.title: What Fursa Dolomiti guests say
reviews.lead: Every trip is shaped around a real family, season and expectation, which is why guests come back and recommend me to friends.

items.text: At first we chose one option ourselves, but after Tatiana’s advice we stopped at another one, and it turned out to be the best decision. The location, service and atmosphere fully matched our expectations.
items.author: Alexey

items.text: We travelled with children and were worried about the organization: it was important that everything felt convenient, calm and free from unnecessary complications. In the end the trip was easy and very comfortable. The hotel was a truly successful choice: a convenient location near the lifts, with a quiet atmosphere away from noise and rush.
items.author: Irina
